overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban downtown. The player moves from a busy intersection across a canal walkway and down to a lower waterfront promenade with food vendors, passing various NPCs and futuristic architecture.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic city intersection with a pedestrian crosswalk. The camera walks across the street as a red vintage convertible drives past. Tall skyscrapers and an elevated highway structure dominate the background, with palm trees lining the street.

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated canal walkway, passing various pedestrians and looking over the water

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto an elevated pedestrian walkway running alongside a canal. The white railing separates the path from the green water below. Various NPCs walk in opposing directions, and futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background. A character in red stands by the railing looking out at the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower waterfront promenade with food vendors

events.description: descends concrete stairs from elevated walkway to lower waterfront level

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs to the lower promenade and approaching a seated street musician

notable_agents.action: seated musician playing green guitar near the water

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading down to lower level
food vendor stalls with distinctive purple neon lighting and white lanterns
seated character with red hair playing a green electric guitar
simple folding chair the musician is seated on

segments.scene_description: The camera descends stairs to a lower waterfront promenade lined with food stalls featuring purple neon lighting. The area is more sheltered with concrete architecture. The camera approaches a seated street musician playing a green guitar near the water's edge, ending with a close-up of the performer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling high-traffic city intersection down to a secluded waterfront promenade. It begins by crossing a street beneath towering skyscrapers and an elevated highway as a red vintage convertible drives past palm-lined sidewalks. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts onto an elevated pedestrian walkway where white railings separate the path from a green canal and passing NPCs. The perspective then descends a set of stairs, transitioning from the open skyline to a sheltered lower level lined with food stalls glowing in purple neon. Finally, the camera glides across the concrete promenade toward the water's edge, ending in a close-up of a street musician playing a green guitar.
